name: CORN C240 White, All-in-One Liquid CPU Cooler, 2*120mm ARGB Fans/Super Engine Pump/FEP polymer water cooling/FDB bearing, Compatible LGA1700, 1200,1151,1150,2066 and AM4, AM5 Socket
shortName: CORN C240 White, All-in-One Liquid CPU Cooler, 2*120mm ARGB
description: All-in-one liquid CPU cooler with 2x120mm ARGB fans and super engine pump supporting multiple Intel and AMD sockets.
